name: Rum/Raisin Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Finely chopped pecans (or other nuts)
1 tablespoon Vinegar and water to make 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measuring cup, combine vinegar and water. Add dry milk and sugar, stirring until dissolved.
2. In the bread pan of your bread machine, add bread flour, baking soda, salt, chopped pecans, raisins, rum flavoring, sugar, and canola oil according to your breadmaker's directions.
3. For a Panasonic breadmaker, place the wet ingredients in last, and use the yeast dispenser for yeast.
4. Bake on the Rapid setting. Since my breadmaker bakes hot, I removed the bread about 12 minutes before the end of the baking cycle.
